We work with sellers and buyers helping them accomplish their goals. Our expert team takes pride in guiding clients through the complex processes of buying, selling, and financing properties in both commercial and residential sectors.

Focusing on long-lasting relationships, our mission is to serve as a dependable advisor for homeowners and business owners in all aspects of real estate throughout Central Florida. The Vintage Team’s service areas include Conway, Orlando, Maitland, Winter Park, Windermere, Altamonte Springs, Delaney Park, Lake Nona Region, Lancaster Park, and beyond.

turns.speaker: assistant

Founded in 2002 by Paul Giles, The Vintage Team at Compass has become a leading real estate agency in Orlando, FL, expertly catering to first-time homebuyers and residential property seekers. We specialize in assisting both sellers and buyers in achieving their real estate goals, offering unparalleled support in both commercial and residential property transactions.

Our experienced team takes immense pride in guiding clients through the complexities of buying, selling, and financing properties across Central Florida. The Vintage Team's mission is to foster enduring relationships by acting as a reliable advisor for homeowners and business owners in all aspects of real estate. Our extensive service areas include Orlando, Conway, Maitland, Winter Park, Windermere, Altamonte Springs, Delaney Park, Lake Nona, Lancaster Park, and beyond.

With The Vintage Team at Compass, clients receive personalized service, unwavering dedication, and the expertise of our close-knit team of real estate professionals. Our commitment to turning your dream of homeownership in Central Florida into reality is unwavering. Trust us to provide exceptional guidance and unmatched customer service, building a lifelong partnership with you on your journey to find the perfect home.
